user.title: PetLibro Lite feeder
user.description: LAN credentials for your already-paired feeder. Extract via tinytuya or see the README. This alone is enough for every feature except live video.

video.title: Live video (optional — skip if you don't want a camera entity)
video.description:
Video requires your PetLibro Lite account email and password (exchanged for a Tuya session) plus the device's P2P admin hash. See docs/video_setup.md for how to capture the hash. Leave everything blank to skip video — every non-video feature still works.

{reason}

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect — verify host, device_id, and local_key.
error.cloud_incomplete: Enter both email and password, or leave both blank to skip video.
error.cloud_auth: Login rejected — see message above the form for the server's reason.

init.title: PetLibro Lite video setup
init.description:
Add or edit video credentials — PetLibro account email/password and the P2P admin hash. Only needed for the camera entity. Clear fields to turn video off; non-video features are unaffected.

{reason}

error.cloud_incomplete: Enter both email and password, or leave both blank to turn video off.
error.cloud_auth: Login rejected — see message above the form for the server's reason.
